race.comment: MISS TALLCHIEF (11) is getting deep into the preparation, but she hasn't seen 56 grade since the first run of the prep, which was nine runs ago. Might not have relished leading last start, so tucked in behind them from the good middle alley she can get home over the top. SEA TRADER (4) has more upside than most in this race and resumes here after a prep that started with an impressive maiden win. Trialled well recently at Caulfield. DOC'S NIPPER (6) last appeared three weeks ago over 1200m at Pakenham when he finished 12th. This is his first run for the Colin Scott stable. In the mix despite the unknowns. ETERNAL DARKNESS (3) has a habit of mixing his form, but has enough in his favour to think he can play a role.
